description: Letter of appeal for charity from Abū l-Riḍā b. Faraj to the Nagid Mevorakh b. Saʿadya at an early point in his career. Beautifully written. The sender had probably formerly been employed by Mevorakh, according to Goitein. The name on verso is written in a different hand than the letter on recto (written by a professional scribe?). (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב בקשת צדקה מאבו אל-ריד'א ב' פרח לנגיד מבורך ב' סעדיה בתחילת כהונתו. כתוב יפה. הכותב כנראה עבד בעבר אצל מבורך.
